'''Cobak''' was a [[Bith/Legends|Bith]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]]. Cobak was born on the [[Bith/Legends|Bith]] [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] [[Clak'dor VII/Legends|Clak'dor VII]] in the [[Colu system]]. [[Zorba Desilijic Tiure|Zorba the Hutt]], the father of the notorious [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]], wanted [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] to be punished for the [[Death/Legends|death]] of his son, so he hired Cobak. Cobak used his resemblance to [[Bithabus]] the Mystifier to capture her.

==Appearances==
*''[[Queen of the Empire]]'' {{1st}}
